title: Grilled Sirloin Steak with Mediterranean Rub
description: A flavorful and juicy sirloin steak seasoned with a Mediterranean-style rub, perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.
instructions: Season the sirloin steak with salt, black pepper, and Mediterranean rub, making sure to coat evenly.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Sear the steak for 3-4 minutes per side, or until a nice crust forms.
Transfer the steak to a cutting board and let it rest for 5-7 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix lemon juice and minced garlic in a small bowl.
Brush the lemon-garlic mixture onto the steak during the last minute of resting.
Slice the steak against the grain and serve immediately.
